title: Pineapple Mango Salsa
ingredients: ½ medium red onion, finely diced
instructions:
Combine the pineapple, mango, onion, and jalapeno. At this point if you choose to use the cilantro it too should be added.
Add the lime juice and salt. The sugar may be added also.
Serve with chips or as garnish with fish or chicken.
